title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
